title: sorghum monatherum
intro: Sorghum monatherum, also known as broom sorghum, is a type of flowering plant in the sorghum family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of sorghum monatherum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from fever to skin infections.
